title: Fix Consecutive Failure Guard — Reset on Partial Progress
description:
Research Report R2-007 (Confidence 87%, Medium). The AgentBackgroundService consecutive failure guard (3-strike counter) resets only on FULL success. Partial progress (e.g., gathering some but not all logs) does NOT reset the counter, which could lead to premature agent shutdown.

Fix: Refine the failure guard logic to reset on partial progress, not just full success. Consider using a sliding window or progress-based reset.

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Codebase Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
